list.searchIapRequired: Searching redirects is part of the premium extension. Please unlock the in-app purchase to use search.

notFound.title: 404 Errors
notFound.iapTeaser: Logging and managing 404 errors is part of the premium extension. Unlock the in-app purchase to use this feature.

modal.title: Create redirect from 404 error
modal.seoUrlHelpText: The SEO URL was automatically loaded from the selected item. You can adjust it manually.
modal.noSeoUrlFound: No SEO URL found for this item. Please enter the target URL manually.
modal.errorEmptyFields: Source URL and target URL must not be empty

notFoundConfig.iapRequired: This feature requires the Premium In-App Purchase.
notFoundConfig.cleanupEnabledLabel: Enable automatic cleanup of 404 log entries
notFoundConfig.retentionDaysHelpText: Entries older than this value (based on last hit) are deleted by the scheduled task. Ignored entries and entries linked to a redirect are kept.

autoRedirect.helpText: When a product with an existing SEO URL is deactivated, a 302 redirect to the homepage is automatically created. When the product is reactivated, the redirect is automatically removed.
autoRedirect.iapRequired: This feature requires the Premium In-App Purchase.

deleteModal.title: Delete automatic redirects?
deleteModal.message: Would you like to delete all automatically created redirects? This action cannot be undone.

detail.autoCreatedInfo: This redirect was automatically created for the product:

queryParamsHandlingValues.transfer: Ignore Query Parameters during search and add them to the target URL

detail.errorSameUrlDescription: The source URL and target URL must not be the same
detail.errorEmptySourceURL: The source URL mustn't be empty
detail.errorEmptyTargetURL: The target URL mustn't be empty
